notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez hit by pitch. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo homers (3) on a fly ball to center field. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. scores.

notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
